tinker.name: Code Diagram
tinker.description: Create diagrams by writing Mermaid text code with live preview

zh-CN.name: 代码图表
zh-CN.description: 通过编写 Mermaid 文本代码生成图表，支持实时预览

get.description: Get the current diagram source, view mode, line count, and render error if any.

set.description: Replace the diagram source in the editor. Changes apply immediately and re-render the preview.
